programme.title: Water Matters Ep105: Changing Climate, Glaciers and Sea Levels

programme.title: Surfing Lifestyle Ep102: Fiji’s Cloudbreak…One of the World’s Best Waves
programme.desc: Cloudbreak is one of the best waves in Fiji, if not the entire world. Four of Australia's best surfers in heavy water conditions had made the call to chase a massive swell heading straight for the fame South Pacific Reef Pass.

programme.title: Blue World Ep804: Deep Wrecks in Lake Champlain + Denver’s High Altitude Aquarium
programme.desc: In Lake Champlain, Blue World explores wrecks that are so deep; there is no natural light on them--ever. Then we travel to an aquarium a mile above sea level to meet some high-altitude sharks and sawfish!

programme.title: Water Ways TV Ep205: Vintage Boat Show + Flyboarding Wake Surfing in Muskoka, Ontario - Canada
programme.desc: Water Ways TV's host, Steven Bull, checks out Muskoka’s rich boating history from steamships to Canada’s largest vintage boat show and gives wake surfing and flyboarding a try!

programme.title: The Blue Realm Ep101: Shark Business
programme.desc: Shark Business unravels some of the mysteries surrounding sharks with controversial behaviorist Dr. Erich Ritter. You'll witness divers testing the limits of shark-human interaction outside of cages with dangerous sharks such as lemon, bull and even great white sharks!

programme.desc: [object Object]

programme.title: MICRODOSE Jamie Lynn - Dose 01
programme.desc: Jamie Lynn is an introvert. In his snowboarding and art-making, however, he’s big and expressive. Watch Episode 1 of his legendary Microdose series. Featuring Circe Wallace, Mike Hatchett, Sean Sullivan, Temple Cummins, Jason Loeb, Micah Shapiro, Colter Gerber, Apostalos and Demetrius Karabotsos.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Jamie Lynn - Dose 02
programme.desc: In Episode 2 of the Jamie Lynn series, Jamie talks about how the creativity of the artists and skateboarders Mark Gonzales and Neil Blender guides his approach to life as a snowboarder and artist. Featuring Circe Wallace, Matt Cummins, Dano Pendygrasse, Joel Gomez, Scott Sullivan, and Matt Remine.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Jamie Lynn - Dose 03
programme.desc: In Episode 3 of the Jamie Lynn Microdose series, we talk with a pioneering professional snowboarder and filmmaker, an iconic 90s shredder, and a Tahoe photographer about Jamie Lynn. Join us for tales of guts, gusto, and good jumping genes. Featuring Dave Seoane, Peter Line, and Ruben Sanchez.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Jamie Lynn - Dose 04
programme.desc: In Episode 4 of the Jamie Lynn Microdose series we talk with a handful of Jamie’s fellow athletes and industry peers about his loyalties to Sessions, Volcom, Vans, and LibTech among other sponsors. Featuring Joel Gomez, Dave Seoane, Richard Woolcott, Bryan Iguchi, Mike Parillo, and Billy Anderson.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Jamie Lynn - Dose 05
programme.desc: In Episode 5 of the Jamie Lynn Microdose series, Terje Haakonsen shares his insights on Mr. Lynn. From annual meet-ups at Mt. Baker to destinations around the world, Terje takes you there. Featuring Terje Haakonsen, Bryan Iguchi, Richard Woolcott, Ryan Immegart, Mike Parillo, and Troy Eckert.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Jamie Lynn - Dose 06
programme.desc: In Episode 6 of the Jamie Lynn Microdose series, Jamie details the process of filming the iconic Volcom snowboarding movie, ‘The Garden,’ directed by Richard Woolcott. Spoiler Alert: The experience was awesome. Featuring Troy Eckert, Tucker Hall, Billy Anderson, Nicholas Adams, and Mike Parillo.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Jamie Lynn - Dose 07
programme.desc: In Episode 7, we set the snowboarding tales aside to go deep on Jamie Lynn’s passion for art-making. Tune-in to learn how Lynn’s tight-knit crew motivated one another, both on and off the hill, to pursue parallel paths in visual art. Featuring Bryan Iguchi, Schoph, Jamie Heinrich and Pete Saari.

programme.title: Speak Two The Wind - Part 1: California to Arizona
programme.desc: In Episode 1, the Volcom Skate Team ride motorcycles through the California and Arizona deserts, embracing all that the open road has to offer. Featuring Collin Provost, Arto Saari, Remy Stratton, Chris Pfanner, Jelle Keppens, Jackson Pilz, Jake Smith, Christian Vankelst, and Lannie Rhoades.

programme.title: Speak Two The Wind - Part 3: Belgium to Germany
programme.desc: In Episode 3, the Volcom Skate Team motorcycle through Belgium and Germany, ride skateboards, and visit The Picturebooks. Featuring Jonathan Thijs, Chris Pfanner, Jelle Keppens, Jackson Pilz, Jake Smith, Christian Vankelst, Lannie Rhoades, Fynn Grabke, Phillip Mirtschink, Claus Grabke, and Baumi.

programme.title: Speak Two The Wind - Part 4: Germany to Denmark
programme.desc: In Episode 4, the Volcom Skate Team ride through Germany and Denmark. In Copenhagen, they visit Motorious, a vintage motorcycle shop. Featuring Collin Provost, Arto Saari, Chris Pfanner, Jackson Pilz, Jake Smith, Christian Vankelst, Lannie Rhoades, Jelle Keppens, Jonathan Thijs and Kasper Krogh.

programme.title: Speak Two The Wind - Part 5: Denmark to Sweden
programme.desc: In Episode 5, the Volcom Skate Team ride motorcycles through Denmark and Sweden, go camping, and hang at Fücker Fest, a motorcycle festival in Sweden. Featuring Collin Provost, Chris Pfanner, Jackson Pilz, Arto Saari, Jake Smith, Christian Vankelst, Lannie Rhoades, Jelle Keppens, and Jonathan Thijs.

programme.title: Speak Two The Wind - Part 6: Mexico
programme.desc: In this bonus episode, skaters CJ Collins, Jackson Pilz, and others ride motorcycles between Mexico City and San Miguel de Allende. Featuring Collin Provost, CJ Collins, Braulio Sagas, Kervin Miranda, Luka Barrena, Arto Saari, Diego Espinoza, Ginther Estrada, Ryan Loughridge, and Lannie Rhoades.

programme.title: Volcom Presents: Teenrager
programme.desc: Skater CJ Collins is now part of the Toy Machine Blood Sucking Skateboard Company. To celebrate his son’s 13th birthday, father Chad Collins made a 13-minute edit of CJ footage he’s been compiling over the years. As the title says, CJ’s not a teenager, he’s a teenrager!

programme.title: La Quinta Films Presents: Lines
programme.desc: Lines is a documentary about big mountain snowboarding. The dedication. The nerve. The skill. As we follow the Absinthe Films crew for six weeks in Haines, Alaska, we also explore the colorful characters, history and dangers of big mountain riding. Directed by Axel Pauporté and Flora Richard.

programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: More
programme.desc: Absinthe raises the bar again. 'More' ushers in a new era of urban riding, deep powder, massive jumps, and the groundbreaking ‘Human Drone’ to bring you closer to snowboarding than ever before.

programme.title: South Beach Classics
programme.desc: Need a classic car? If you're in Miami, where old-time autos fit in perfectly with the city's glitz and glamour, Ted Vernon is the man to see. The no-nonsense, gregarious Long Islander runs Florida's largest classic car dealership, where he buys, sells, trades and exchanges unique cars from a lot that houses more than 300 of them. His outgoing personality meshes seamlessly with the colourful collectibles he moves each day, helped by an eclectic shop crew affectionately dubbed `the gargoyles'.

programme.title: Football Nation

programme.title: California Republic

programme.title: Discovering Karpathos - Part 2
programme.desc: We take a stroll down the village of Arkansa, in the middle of Karpathos. The village is loved by tourists who have been coming for over 20 years. Then, we are going to explore some of the ruins of the island, starting in the north in the ancient Vrikous. The island is filled with Ancient Greek ruins we cannot miss on before boarding on a windsurf experience. With the Meltemi wind, Karpathos has become a windsurfing paradise.

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 11

programme.title: A Shot In The Dark
programme.desc: A baby is kidnapped in a Brazilian airport. Years later, the mother lives in Lisbon and works in a strip-tease bar so she can survive. When she is fired, she joins a gang of bank robbers...

programme.title: Alien Rising
programme.desc: A savvy ex-homeland security agent and martial arts expert is forced to a remote island to help the military unlock the secrets of an extraterrestrial technology.

programme.title: Anonymous
programme.desc: Artemis and Cash set out to take down a child sex trafficking ring and, in doing so discover Artemis' long lost son, only to find there are grave consequences that may cost them their lives and the ones they love. Unbeknownst to Artemis, the hard core enforcer, Olivier (Ernest L. Thomas -What's Happening, Malcolm X, Everybody Hates Chris) is also searching for the boy and willing to do anything to find him.

programme.title: Domestic Hell
programme.desc: Jack and Julia are a couple with dark secrets. Blanca is a tortured soul with a past. And Olivia is hellbent on finding the truth. When these four lives intersect, nobody escapes. Bonds are tested; wills are broken; and, metal is forged. It's a tale of survival, trust, and darkness from the creators of Bloody Drama.

programme.title: Satan Claus
programme.desc: With the clock ticking and the body count rising, Homicide Detective Timothy Reynolds reluctantly volunteers to assist his former partner, Detective Alan Fryer, with the investigation to a slew of grisly murders left behind by a mission orientated killer during the Christmas holidays.

programme.title: Beware the Boogeyman
programme.desc: Dr. Tristian Mackenzie makes her way to a Psychiatric Hospital for the criminally insane, where she learns of the strange series of cases from Dr. Moon.

programme.title: Close Quarter Battle - S01:E09 - Private Military Contractors
programme.desc: The practice of hiring private armies goes back to ancient times, and the mystique associated with the mercenary warrior has been the subject of many historical studies and fictional characterizations. This episode of CQB takes a more contemporary look at a day in the life of a group of civilian contractors, and how their role has evolved on the modern battlefield. Using its “sub-second” analysis techniques and intimate first-person footage, CQB reveals the backgrounds, training and equipment of today’s “soldiers for hire” and how private armies are re-shaping the way conflicts are conducted around the world.

programme.title: Close Quarter Battle - S01:E10 - Close Protection
programme.desc: From the elite ex-special forces personnel in charge of guarding heads of state in conflict zones to the two-person teams that protect CEOs in dangerous regions, modern day bodyguards must be well versed in close quarter battle techniques. An immense amount of planning and preparation is involved in each operation. From air travel, car convoys and helicopter shuttles to basic foot traffic, a close protection squad must be completely tuned to the Who, What, Where and When of any given situation. This episode of CQB focuses on the complex day-to-day and minute-to-minute operations of these elite teams and the highly developed techniques they employ.

programme.title: Wildlife Heroes - S01:E05 - Extreme Conditions
programme.desc: Conservationists capture and study Whitetail Deer in the frigid South Dakotan winter.

programme.title: Wildlife Heroes - S01:E06 - Capturing the Wild
programme.desc: Conservationists employ sophisticated tactics to capture kudu, impala, and giraffe.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E25 - Kate The Making Of A Modern Queen
programme.desc: A look at the Duchess of Cambridge's journey from being an everyday young woman to becoming a future queen, and what her evolution signifies for the royal family.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E12 - The New Royals
programme.desc: Princesses Beatrice and Eugenie have gone through a lot of media attention and tough situations in their lives. From their parents' very public split to being targeted by the press, they've been through quite a bit. Despite all this, they remain dedicated to supporting the monarchy with their charity work. Through serving the Commonwealth, both sisters continue to make a positive impact.

programme.title: Diana: In Search of Happiness
programme.desc: Experience an in-depth look at Princess Diana, the extraordinary woman of the 20th century. Featuring unique interviews and touching clips, this portrait captures her incredible journey to fame and her ability to overcome the emotional and physical challenges she encountered nearly every day.

programme.title: Survive the Wild - S01:E01 - Rules of the Realm
programme.desc: Animals or groups protect their territory by using sounds like birds singing or scents like pheromones from many mammals to mark boundaries. These are just the initial warnings. If other animals ignore these signs, a conflict might happen. Animals need a secure territory to mate, raise their young, and ensure there's enough food and resources for survival. This episode looks at the strategies animals use to claim their territory.

programme.title: In Your Arms
programme.desc: The poetic tale of a man with a neurological disorder and the enigmatic nurse persuaded to support him with assisted suicide.

programme.title: Name Me
programme.desc: An adeptly played debut in which a yearning for paternal affection plays out against a background of teenage sexual manipulation.

programme.desc: After a vacation romance, Kenneth and Theres lose sight of each other. But fate brings them together again 30 years later.

programme.title: Don't Forget Where You Come From
programme.desc: Feeling like you don’t have enough? God has given you an inheritance, so don’t let pressure shrink your perspective or make you forget who you are. The God who brought you this far is more than capable of driving out what’s in your way.

programme.title: It's Worth The Dirt
programme.desc: Wondering if you should give up because progress feels slow? Wisdom isn’t choosing what’s easiest, it’s choosing what’s worth it. If you’re tempted to quit because it’s hard, remember: God uses pressure and patience to prepare you for something greater.

programme.title: Not Something, But Someone
programme.desc: Pastor Steven shares a simple truth that can help you endure life’s hardest trials. True security isn't the absence of trouble; it’s the presence of a Savior who promises you’ll never walk through it alone.

programme.title: God I'm Just Grateful

programme.title: Faith to Stay
programme.desc: When we’re going through a season that’s uncomfortable or uncertain, we often look for a way out. But Jesus demonstrates another way that leads to lasting transformation and fulfillment if we have the faith to follow His example.

programme.title: Stop Staring At That Stone
programme.desc: Have you ever noticed how two people can be looking at the same thing and have completely different perspectives on it? One might see a problem while the other sees a reason to praise. There might be something in your life that looks like a problem right now, but God is inviting you to pivot so you can see the truth.

programme.title: It Still Works
programme.desc: Pastor Steven showed us through the life of Moses how faith often looks like taking action even while you feel full of doubt. God can do miracles when we have the courage to look our doubt in the face and do it anyway.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila, in order to make Patricia live the same anguish that her mother must have felt, will offer her help and then expose her publicly. Camila has the recorded video of what happened with Celso and the condition for not handing it over to the police is that Fausto tells how his mother was incriminated.

programme.title: Corazon Traicionado
programme.desc: Maria Lourdes appears before Judge Echeverri and turns herself in for the crime of corruption and accepting bribes from Gertrudis; she hands over a folder with documents that prove what she says to bring Mrs. Corona down with her - Gertrudis scoffs at Alberto's accusations and denies, once again, being a murderer. Alberto goes to the library, he cannot live knowing what his mother did and is unable to accept. A gunshot is heard and everything seems to indicate that Alberto committed suicide. Lorena, enraged, blames Gertrudis for what happened and the Chief corroborates the death of her son. Gertrudis falls to her knees, shattered, screaming like a wounded beast.

programme.title: Corazon Traicionado
programme.desc: Alberto arrives at the park where Lorena is with Norma and Ignacio. It seems to him that it is time for forgiveness and he tells her what he did with Claudio and Gertrudis, following the advice she gave him; now he feels relieved and ready to move on. Alberto, kneeling before her, proposes to Lorena with a ring in his hands. She accepts happily. "He who forgives offense, cultivates love..." End.

programme.title: El Desprecio
programme.desc: Responding to Israel's call, Clara Inés and Raúl become tense as they do not know what truth the man wants to talk to them about.

programme.title: El Desprecio
programme.desc: In front of Elisenda, Pastora reveals that Misael has always been special to her; Israel has challenged him to death.

programme.title: Te Tengo en Salsa
programme.desc: Carlos Raul is surprised when Ninoska appears before him with a child he claims to be his son.

programme.title: Te Tengo en Salsa
programme.desc: Pressured by Matilde, Carlos Raul explains that, although he intends to take care of his son, he will not give up his intention to get Adriana back.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Al llegar a la casa de El Jagüey, Madre Isabel no los deja entrar, conocen a Henry y presumen que también pueda ser hijo de Rosa Blanco. Max piensa que algo grave

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: La Madre Isabel, insiste en que Rosa Blanco causará mucho daño a Camila. Poco lo que se sabe, sólo que por una llamada asegura que regresará para vengarse.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Marcelina visita a la Madre Isabel para hablarle sobre su relación con Rosa Blanco, quien fue su mejor amiga y ella la traicionó; por eso quiere impedir su regreso.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Roberto confiesa que fue él quien asesinó a Gabriel para inculpar a Camila. Camila, llora de alegría, al saberse inocente de esa muerte. Max le reitera su incondicional apoyo ratificándole su gran amor. Ezequiel expresa su intención de casarse con Camila

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Ezequiel rechazado por Camila, la manipula con una nueva oferta de trabajo como asistente de su hija Julia y todo para tratar de conseguir su cercanía. Max, confía en el amor de Camila. Torrealba pide que unan esfuerzos para encontrar a Rosa Blanco.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Ante las intenciones de Ezequiel, Octavia y Marcelina agreden verbalmente a Camila. Max le propone y Camila duda pero accede a casarse con él. En una cena, Ezequiel reúne a sus hijos y Camila será la homenajeada especial.

programme.title: Catemaco: Magia y Misterio
programme.desc: Una familia normal va de vacaciones a Catemaco, Michoacan un pueblo famoso y pintoresco en Mexico. Todo marcha bien hasta que son atacados por criminales, el padre sobrevive, y con ayuda del brujo mayor del pueblo cobra venganza.

programme.title: Entre Brujas y Nahuales
programme.desc: En la ciudad de Tulancingo Hidalgo, Acatlán y San Dionicio la gente anda muy asustada, pues se rumora que están ocurriendo sucesos fuera de lo normal, tal como desaparición de niños de quienes se han encontrado cuerpos sin sangre, dicen que son las brujas, porque han visto bolas de fuego que aparecen y desaparecen, pero nadie sabe la verdad lo que esta pasando y existe mucho miedo en la población de la región.

programme.title: El Juego del Sexo
programme.desc: Un alienígena cambiante procedente del espacio exterior causa estragos en un pequeño pueblo rural del suroeste de Estados Unidos, cerca del legendario Área 51 de fama ovni. Estos extraterrestres son una raza devoradora de cerebros a quienes les encanta decapitar y comerse a los humanos. Están entre nosotros y lo han estado durante millones de años.

programme.title: El Deseo de Domingo
programme.desc: Narra la historia de Domingo, un adulto mayor que sufre Alzheimer y pasa sus días en un geriátrico en la ciudad de Viedma, desde donde intenta, a toda costa, viajar a la Capital, a San Isidro, a ver el gran premio de turf Carlos Pellegrini. Pero claro, no se trata de cualquier premio, sino el del año 1952. Para eso necesitará de la ayuda de Marcelo, su nieto, quien se encuentra en el dilema de conformarse con su puesto en una dependencia pública o seguir luchando por triunfar con su banda de rock. …

programme.title: Call TV
programme.desc: Lucía, una actriz en decadencia, acepta presentar un programa nocturno de preguntas tontas. Sin darse cuenta de que se ha metido en un gran lío que le hará pasar la peor noche de su vida

programme.title: ¿Quieres Ser Mi Rehén?
programme.desc: Ulises, un diseñador publicitario, es tomado como rehén por una hermosa y misteriosa mujer en el día más importante de su vida y en su propia oficina. Al mismo tiempo, la exesposa de Ulises acude a su oficina y complica todavía más la situación.

programme.title: Cartero
programme.desc: Hernán Sosa es un joven tímido que viene del interior a la ciudad. En su pueblo siempre estuvo enamorado de una chica inalcanzable, Yanina. Hernán consigue trabajo en el correo. Durante el reparto, Hernán descubre que Yanina se encuentra en la ciudad, en la zona de su reparto. En consecuencia, comienza a desplegar sus nuevos conocimientos de cartero para llegar hasta ella. Pero a medida que se acerca, descubre que unos viejos carteros están organizando un robo en el mismo edificio donde trabaja Yanina. Envalentonado por la fuerza del amor, Hernán se enfrentará a los peligros que rodean a Yanina para llegar a declararle lo que siente.

programme.title: El Deseo de Domingo

programme.title: The Amazing Mr. X
programme.desc: Una viuda en duelo es seducida por un espiritista que afirma poder contactar a su difunto esposo, pero nada es lo que parece.

programme.title: A Bucket of Blood
programme.desc: Un camarero de un café beatnik se convierte en un artista asesino para alimentar su nueva fama.

programme.title: Abilene Town
programme.desc: Un sheriff intenta detener los conflictos entre colonos en el Oeste tras la Guerra Civil.

programme.title: Detour
programme.desc: El viaje de un autoestopista hacia California se convierte en una pesadilla de muerte, chantaje y encuentros fatales con una despiadada femme fatale.
